MAXEK ERP — VPS Patch v1.0.1 Hotfix
Generated: 2026-06-28
Archive: deploy/dist/vps-patch-v1.0.1-hotfix.zip

Purpose
-------
Minimal VPS deployment patch so the application starts via WSGI without requiring
bulk import or data import Python modules on the server. Bulk/data import routes
register only when those modules are present.

Files in archive
----------------
app.py
  Wrap bulk_import_routes and data_import_routes imports in try/except and register
  routes only when import succeeds. Allows wsgi import and app boot on VPS without
  bulk import dependencies.

standard_boq_library_service.py
  Standard BOQ library service included in the v1.0.1 hotfix bundle for VPS parity
  with UAT fixes.

static/js/maxek-ui.js
  Shared MAXEK UI JavaScript included in the v1.0.1 hotfix bundle for client-side
  fixes shipped with this release.

Deployment
----------
Extract zip at application root (preserve paths). Restart WSGI/application service.
Do not deploy bulk_import_*.py or data_import_*.py unless bulk import is required.
